# Drone News 48h Brief — February 25, 2026

_Window: last 48 hours; 63 incidents._

## Summary
In the last 48 hours, a series of drone incidents have highlighted ongoing issues with smuggling and unauthorized operations. Notably, multiple reported attempts to smuggle drugs, technology, and combat materials via drones have emerged from various regions, including charges against individuals in Poland for attempting to export drone technology to Russia. Further, allegations of drug smuggling attempts using drones were reported in Jordan, while the United States faced persistent challenges with drones being used for illegal deliveries to prisons. In security updates, unauthorized drone activity disrupted flights in Da Nang, Vietnam, and illegal drone operations were addressed by military and law enforcement agencies across several countries. The proliferation of drones raises significant concerns about privacy, safety, and security in both urban and border areas.

**By category:** airport: 4 • arrest: 5 • crash: 1 • interference: 3 • other: 13 • security: 4 • smuggling: 29 • terrorism: 4
**Top queries:** drone smuggling (22), drone terrorism (9), drone arrest (7), drone incident (7), drone prison (7)

## Highlights
- **[Alleged smugglers caught after cartel drone support falters](https://news.google.?oc=5)** — Law enforcement apprehended alleged smugglers who were reportedly using drones supported by cartel operations. _(score 0.90; tags: smuggling, crime)_
